options.content:
## Tools & MCP
Tool calls, failure rates, and likely MCP or extension-provided tools.

azureLogAnalytics.query: AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), ''), fallback_session=strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm')) | join kind=leftouter (AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), '') | where isnotempty(direct_session) | summarize operation_session=take_any(direct_session) by OperationId) on OperationId | extend conversation=iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']))), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$agentops_agent' == '$__all' or agentops_agent in (${agentops_agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$skill' == '$__all' or skill in (${skill:singlequote})) | where ('$mcp_server' == '$__all' or mcp_server in (${mcp_server:singlequote})) | where ('$script' == '$__all' or script in (${script:singlequote})) | where operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool) | summarize Calls=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), ''), fallback_session=strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm')) | join kind=leftouter (AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), '') | where isnotempty(direct_session) | summarize operation_session=take_any(direct_session) by OperationId) on OperationId | extend conversation=iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']))), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$agentops_agent' == '$__all' or agentops_agent in (${agentops_agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$skill' == '$__all' or skill in (${skill:singlequote})) | where ('$mcp_server' == '$__all' or mcp_server in (${mcp_server:singlequote})) | where ('$script' == '$__all' or script in (${script:singlequote})) | where operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool) | summarize Failures=countif(Success == false or isnotempty(error)) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), ''), fallback_session=strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm')) | join kind=leftouter (AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), '') | where isnotempty(direct_session) | summarize operation_session=take_any(direct_session) by OperationId) on OperationId | extend conversation=iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']))), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$agentops_agent' == '$__all' or agentops_agent in (${agentops_agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$skill' == '$__all' or skill in (${skill:singlequote})) | where ('$mcp_server' == '$__all' or mcp_server in (${mcp_server:singlequote})) | where ('$script' == '$__all' or script in (${script:singlequote})) | where operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool) | where tool !in ('bash','powershell','list_bash','list_powershell','read_bash','read_powershell','stop_bash','stop_powershell','write_bash','write_powershell','apply_patch','create','edit','view','list_agents','read_agent','task','ask_user','glob','grep','rg','skill','web_fetch') and isnotempty(tool) | summarize Tools=dcount(tool) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

// MCP and tool usage view for Copilot CLI AgentOps.
// Copilot reports all tool invocations as execute_tool spans. Built-in tools are
// classified from the documented CLI tool list. MCP tools are inferred from the
// documented namespaced forms: mcp__<server>__<tool> and <server>/<tool>.
let lookback = 7d;
let builtin_tools = dynamic([
    "bash", "powershell", "list_bash", "list_powershell", "read_bash", "read_powershell",
    "stop_bash", "stop_powershell", "write_bash", "write_powershell", "apply_patch",
    "create", "edit", "view", "list_agents", "read_agent", "task", "ask_user",
    "glob", "grep", "rg", "skill", "web_fetch"
]);
let session_id = (props:dynamic, timestamp:datetime) {
    case(
        isnotempty(tostring(props["gen_ai.conversation.id"])),
        tostring(props["gen_ai.conversation.id"]),
        isnotempty(tostring(props["github.copilot.interaction_id"])),
        tostring(props["github.copilot.interaction_id"]),
        strcat(
            tostring(props["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
            "_",
            tostring(props["github.copilot.turn_count"]),
            "_",
            format_datetime(bin(timestamp, 1h), "yyyyMMdd_HHmm")
        )
    )
};
let raw_spans =
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where Properties has "github.copilot" and Properties has "github-copilot-cli"
| extend
    direct_session = case(
        isnotempty(tostring(Properties["gen_ai.conversation.id"])),
        tostring(Properties["gen_ai.conversation.id"]),
        isnotempty(tostring(Properties["github.copilot.interaction_id"])),
        tostring(Properties["github.copilot.interaction_id"]),
        ""
    ),
    fallback_session = session_id(Properties, TimeGenerated),
    operation = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.operation.name"]),
    tool = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.tool.name"]),
    configured_servers = tostring(Properties["agentops.mcp.config.servers"]),
    configured_files = tostring(Properties["agentops.mcp.config.files"]),
    disabled_servers = tostring(Properties["agentops.mcp.disabled.servers"]),
    github_tools = tostring(Properties["agentops.mcp.github.tools"]),
    github_toolsets = tostring(Properties["agentops.mcp.github.toolsets"]),
    model = coalesce(tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.model"]), tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"])),
    mode = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.mode"]),
    repo = tostring(Properties["agentops.repo.hash"]),
    error = tostring(Properties["error.type"]);
let operation_sessions =
raw_spans
| where isnotempty(direct_session)
| summarize operation_session = take_any(direct_session) by OperationId;
raw_spans
| join kind=leftouter operation_sessions on OperationId
| extend session = iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session))
| where operation == "execute_tool" or isnotempty(tool)
| extend
    single_configured_server = iff(isnotempty(configured_servers) and configured_servers !contains "|", configured_servers, "")
| extend
    mcp_server = case(
        tool startswith "mcp__", extract(@"^mcp__(.+?)__", 1, tool),
        tool contains "/", tostring(split(tool, "/")[0]),
        isnotempty(tool) and isnotempty(single_configured_server) and tool !in (builtin_tools), single_configured_server,
        ""
    ),
    mcp_tool = case(
        tool startswith "mcp__", extract(@"^mcp__.+?__(.+)$", 1, tool),
        tool contains "/", tostring(split(tool, "/")[1]),
        tool
    )
| extend
    tool_family = case(
        tool in (builtin_tools), "builtin",
        isnotempty(mcp_server), "mcp",
        tool has "-", "likely_mcp_or_extension",
        isnotempty(tool), "custom_or_unknown",
        "unknown"
    ),
    success = Success != false and isempty(error)
| summarize
    calls = count(),
    failures = countif(not(success)),
    sessions = dcount(session),
    p50_duration_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 50),
    p95_duration_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 95),
    first_seen = min(TimeGenerated),
    last_seen = max(TimeGenerated),
    models = make_set_if(model, isnotempty(model), 5),
    modes = make_set_if(mode, isnotempty(mode), 5),
    repos = make_set_if(repo, isnotempty(repo), 5),
    configured_mcp_servers = make_set_if(configured_servers, isnotempty(configured_servers), 10),
    configured_mcp_files = make_set_if(configured_files, isnotempty(configured_files), 10),
    disabled_mcp_servers = make_set_if(disabled_servers, isnotempty(disabled_servers), 10),
    selected_github_mcp_tools = make_set_if(github_tools, isnotempty(github_tools), 10),
    selected_github_mcp_toolsets = make_set_if(github_toolsets, isnotempty(github_toolsets), 10),
    errors = make_set_if(error, isnotempty(error), 10)
    by tool_family, mcp_server, mcp_tool, tool
| extend failure_pct = round(100.0 * failures / calls, 1)
| order by tool_family asc, mcp_server asc, failures desc, calls desc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), ''), fallback_session=strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm')) | join kind=leftouter (AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend direct_session=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), '') | where isnotempty(direct_session) | summarize operation_session=take_any(direct_session) by OperationId) on OperationId | extend conversation=iff(isnotempty(operation_session), operation_session, iff(isnotempty(direct_session), direct_session, fallback_session)) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name'])), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']))), script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$agentops_agent' == '$__all' or agentops_agent in (${agentops_agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where ('$skill' == '$__all' or skill in (${skill:singlequote})) | where ('$mcp_server' == '$__all' or mcp_server in (${mcp_server:singlequote})) | where ('$script' == '$__all' or script in (${script:singlequote})) | where operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool) | project TimeGenerated, Session=conversation, tool, model, repo, DurationMs, Success, ResultCode, error | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 300

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']) | where isnotempty(model) | distinct model | order by model asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where isnotempty(operation) | distinct operation | order by operation asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']) | where isnotempty(agent) | distinct agent | order by agent asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend agentops_agent=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.agent.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.cli.agent']), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name'])) | where isnotempty(agentops_agent) | distinct agentops_agent | order by agentops_agent asc

union isfuzzy=true AppDependencies, AppTraces, AppEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where tostring(Properties) has_any ('agentops.skill', 'github.copilot.skill') | extend skill=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.skill.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.skill.name'])) | where isnotempty(skill) | distinct skill | order by skill asc

union isfuzzy=true AppDependencies, AppTraces, AppEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where tostring(Properties) has_any ('agentops.mcp', 'mcp__') | extend tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), mcp_server=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.server']), tostring(Properties['agentops.mcp.config.servers']), extract('^mcp__([^_]+)__', 1, tool), extract('^([^/]+)/', 1, tool)) | where isnotempty(mcp_server) | distinct mcp_server | order by mcp_server asc

union isfuzzy=true AppDependencies, AppTraces, AppEvents | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where tostring(Properties) has_any ('agentops.script', 'agentops.hook', 'github.copilot.hook') | extend script=coalesce(tostring(Properties['agentops.script.name']), tostring(Properties['agentops.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.name']), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.hook.type'])) | where isnotempty(script) | distinct script | order by script asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | where isnotempty(repo) | distinct repo | order by repo asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where (Properties has 'github.copilot' or Properties has 'gen_ai.operation.name' or AppRoleName in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli') or tostring(Properties['service.name']) in ('github-copilot', 'copilot-chat', 'github-copilot-cli')) | extend tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) | where isnotempty(tool) | distinct tool | order by tool asc
